themes.theme: No audit trail for AI-assisted edits
themes.requirement: Exportable, append-only audit log of every AI-assisted edit (who, what, when).
themes.representative_quote: Without an exportable audit log this fails our internal review.

themes.theme: Can't restrict who approves sensitive matters
themes.requirement: Role-based approval permissions, scoped by practice group and matter value.
themes.representative_quote: We need approval permissions by practice group.

themes.requirement: Guided in-product onboarding flow with role-specific first tasks.
themes.representative_quote: The first session is great, then people drift back to old habits.

themes.theme: Citations not always traceable to the source
themes.requirement: Click-through citation grounding: every cited passage links to the source location.
themes.representative_quote: I can't trust a summary I can't click through to the clause.

themes.requirement: Weekly per-team usage view with low-usage warnings.
themes.representative_quote: I'd like to see which teams are actually using it each week.
